title: Lazy rows at root
description: Shows ChangeLp growing the root LP one row at a time.
command: ./bazel-bin/ortools/sat/sat_runner --input=examples/sat/lp_debug/01_lazy_rows_vs_all_rows.textproto --visualization_trace_output=examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/01_lazy_root.trace.json --params='cp_model_presolve:false linearization_level:2 num_workers:1 log_search_progress:false log_linear_programming_progress:2 log_to_stdout:true stop_after_root_propagation:true cut_level:0 add_lp_constraints_lazily:true new_constraints_batch_size:1' > examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/01_lazy_root.log 2>&1
sourceLabel: Bundled example: Lazy rows at root

title: All rows at root
description: The same model with eager row loading, so the LP starts full.
command: ./bazel-bin/ortools/sat/sat_runner --input=examples/sat/lp_debug/01_lazy_rows_vs_all_rows.textproto --visualization_trace_output=examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/01_all_rows_root.trace.json --params='cp_model_presolve:false linearization_level:2 num_workers:1 log_search_progress:false log_linear_programming_progress:2 log_to_stdout:true stop_after_root_propagation:true cut_level:0 add_lp_constraints_lazily:false' > examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/01_all_rows_root.log 2>&1
sourceLabel: Bundled example: All rows at root

title: Full solve with incumbent
description: Includes bound updates, a new incumbent event, and search finish.
command: ./bazel-bin/ortools/sat/sat_runner --input=examples/sat/lp_debug/02_local_branch_resolve.textproto --visualization_trace_output=examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/02_full_solve.trace.json --params='cp_model_presolve:false linearization_level:2 num_workers:1 log_search_progress:false log_linear_programming_progress:2 log_to_stdout:true cut_level:0 add_lp_constraints_lazily:false search_branching:FIXED_SEARCH' > examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/02_full_solve.log 2>&1
sourceLabel: Bundled example: Full solve with incumbent

title: Product without cuts
description: A product constraint that contributes only a cut generator.
command: ./bazel-bin/ortools/sat/sat_runner --input=examples/sat/lp_debug/03_product_cut_generator.textproto --visualization_trace_output=examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/03_no_cuts_root.trace.json --params='cp_model_presolve:false linearization_level:2 num_workers:1 log_search_progress:false log_linear_programming_progress:2 log_to_stdout:true stop_after_root_propagation:true cut_level:0 add_lp_constraints_lazily:false' > examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/03_no_cuts_root.log 2>&1

title: Product with cuts
description: The same product example after enabling root cut generation.
command: ./bazel-bin/ortools/sat/sat_runner --input=examples/sat/lp_debug/03_product_cut_generator.textproto --visualization_trace_output=examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/03_with_cuts_root.trace.json --params='cp_model_presolve:false linearization_level:2 num_workers:1 log_search_progress:false log_linear_programming_progress:2 log_to_stdout:true stop_after_root_propagation:true cut_level:1 add_lp_constraints_lazily:false max_cut_rounds_at_level_zero:3' > examples/sat/lp_debug/generated/03_with_cuts_root.log 2>&1
